items.claim: Manel Kape possesses more power than Deiveson Figueiredo did at flyweight in 2020.
items.quote: I'd argue Manel Kape maybe even has even more power than Figueiredo did back then.

items.claim: Brandon Royval's striking defense is poor and he leaves his chin exposed.
items.quote: He leaves his chin up in the air and his striking defense is not the best.

items.claim: Brandon Royval has a history of being dropped in his fights.
items.quote: I've seen Vance drop Royval. I've seen, you know, Cop drop Royval. Uh I saw, oh goodness, didn't Matt Schnell drop Royval, too?

items.claim: Mario Bautista's wrestling is highly effective and underrated.
items.quote: his wrestling, too, is very underrated. I don't know, you can't say it's underrated anymore after his victory over Oliveira.

items.claim: Cory Sandhagen has not delivered a high-level performance since his fight against Chito Vera in March 2023.
items.quote: We haven't seen a great Sandhagen performance since then.

items.claim: Mario Bautista's style of mixing striking and wrestling will disrupt Cory Sandhagen.
items.quote: he's going to mix the striking with the wrestling quite a bit. And stylistically, I believe even though, you know, he lost the first fight, stylistically, this is a good fight for Merab Bautista.
